purpose: Single consolidated TODO for fixing the Autopilot new-project/coding flow with LLM-first project creation, policy-driven propose orchestration, robust normalization, safe execution boundaries and artifact-first completion.

current_state_summary.overall: Core architecture fully implemented and tested. Real LLM strategy wiring (FA-T021) is the remaining blocker for production.
implemented: ProposePolicy and ProposePolicyService with cascade merging.
LLMResponseNormalizer with 6 normalization paths (tool_calls, fenced JSON, shell, diff, file blocks, prose).
TaskRetryPolicyService: advisory parse failure + valid artifacts = NOT retryable.
propose_task_step persists last_proposal with propose_strategy_meta when executable.
GET /api/tasks/<tid>/artifact-status exposes attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, normalization_format, artifact_summary, completion_decision.
E2E tests: test_autopilot_new_project_fibonacci, test_llm_assisted_project_creation, test_llm_assisted_project_evolution all passing.
critical_gaps: FA-T021: worker_strategy, tool_calling_llm, json_schema_llm, flexible_llm_normalization are still StubStrategy in propose_task_step.
Because LLM strategies are stubs, ananta new-project does not call Ollama/LLM in the default implementation path yet.
LLMRepairStrategy, WorkerStrategy and ContextBundleService examples are partial stubs.

answer_to_user_question.question: Ist berücksichtigt, dass bei new-project über ananta im Default-Weg das LLM, z. B. Ollama, immer gefragt werden muss?
answer_to_user_question.short_answer: Policy-seitig ja, technisch im echten Default-Flow noch nicht vollständig.
details: In ProposePolicy ist new_software_project bereits LLM-first konfiguriert: tool_calling_llm -> json_schema_llm -> flexible_llm_normalization -> worker -> deterministic_handler.
llm_mode ist für new_software_project auf primary_with_guardrails gesetzt.
In TaskScopedExecutionService werden diese Strategien aber aktuell als StubStrategy registriert. Dadurch wird noch kein Ollama/OpenAI-kompatibler Provider real aufgerufen.

Soll-Zustand: new-project muss im Default eine echte ModelInvocation über lokal bevorzugten Provider, z. B. Ollama/OpenAI-compatible, versuchen. Deterministische Handler dürfen nur Guardrail/Fallback sein, nicht der Default-Ersatz für das LLM.
answer_to_user_question.required_policy_change: Make new_software_project LLM-required by default: if no LLM provider is configured or reachable, return needs_review/failed with reason llm_required_but_unavailable instead of silently falling back to deterministic-only generation.
answer_to_user_question.required_implementation_change: Replace StubStrategy('tool_calling_llm') and StubStrategy('json_schema_llm') with real strategies using ModelInvocationService/Ollama/OpenAI-compatible APIs and pass real tool schemas or JSON schema response_format where supported.

target_flow: Orchestrator loads ProposePolicy; for new_software_project the default path requires an LLM attempt first
ToolCallingLLMStrategy calls Ollama/OpenAI-compatible/provider API with real tool schemas when supported
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy calls provider with strict JSON schema when tools are unsupported
LLMResponseNormalizer accepts valid alternative formats but never executes raw prose
Only normalized ExecutableProposal is persisted as last_proposal
POST /tasks/<tid>/step/execute consumes only last_proposal or explicit validated command/tool_calls
TaskCompletionPolicy decides completed/needs_review/retryable_failed/failed from artifacts and verification

status_model.done: Implemented and verified enough to rely on.
status_model.todo: Missing, stubbed, unsafe, inconsistent or not sufficiently tested.
status_model.partial: Code exists, but acceptance criteria are not fully met.

milestones.title: Autopilot E2E, UI/API, docs and cleanup

tasks.title: Fix proposal contracts: dataclass/Pydantic mismatch and schema validation
ist_state: worker/core/propose.py defines ExecutableProposal and ProposeStrategyResult as dataclasses.
agent/services/task_scoped_execution_service.py execute path calls ExecutableProposal.model_validate(...), which does not exist on a dataclass.
No reliable evidence found for schema files/tests claimed by the previous TODO.
acceptance_criteria: Choose one consistent contract style: Pydantic BaseModel or pure dataclass plus explicit validate_executable_proposal().
execute_task_step validates last_proposal without AttributeError.
At least one of command or non-empty tool_calls is required.
Free text only is rejected as executable.
Tests cover valid command, valid tool_calls, advisory text, declined result and invalid executable payload.

tasks.title: Finalize ProposePolicy defaults and new-project LLM-required behavior
ist_state: agent/services/propose_policy.py exists.
new_software_project is configured LLM-first and llm_mode=primary_with_guardrails.
Safe default max_strategy_attempts=1 is dangerous because only the first configured strategy is tried.
No explicit llm_required/default provider behavior is enforced yet.
acceptance_criteria: new_software_project default policy requires a real LLM attempt before deterministic fallback.
If no LLM provider is configured/reachable, result is needs_review or failed with reason llm_required_but_unavailable.
Default local provider preference supports Ollama/OpenAI-compatible configuration.
max_strategy_attempts semantics are fixed: either attempt all configured strategies by default or rename to max_attempts_per_strategy.
Tests cover new_software_project LLM-first order, no-provider failure, provider fallback and unsafe legacy_sgpt rejection.

tasks.title: Inventory and block ungoverned legacy propose paths
ist_state: propose_task_step no longer directly executes the old sgpt propose body.
Legacy structured_action imports and older helper methods still exist in task_scoped_execution_service.py.
No static regression test evidence found.
acceptance_criteria: No direct sgpt/run_sgpt_command call can be reached from propose_task_step except explicit LegacySgptStrategy with admin override.
Regression test monkeypatches sgpt to raise and proves propose still follows orchestrator path.
Old repair/parse helpers are either removed, wrapped as strategies or clearly marked legacy.

tasks.title: Harden proposal artifact types
ist_state: Proposal artifact dataclasses exist inside worker/core/propose.py.
Path traversal and absolute path validation are not implemented for FileProposalArtifact/PatchProposalArtifact.
Schema files and tests are not verified.
acceptance_criteria: Move or clearly separate artifact classes from executable proposal contracts.
Reject absolute paths, path traversal and symlink escape.
Patch/file proposals are not executable until validated/applied by a controlled path.
Tests cover safe paths, unsafe paths, diff proposals and file proposals.

tasks.title: Complete ProposeStrategyOrchestrator behavior and diagnostics
ist_state: worker/core/propose_orchestrator.py exists.
Current loop slices strategy_order by max_strategy_attempts and may skip most fallback strategies.
No attempted_strategies/selected_strategy diagnostics are added.
No persistence of last_proposal is performed in the shown orchestrator code.
acceptance_criteria: Orchestrator tries configured strategy chain according to fixed policy semantics.
First executable result stops the chain.
Declined/advisory/parse failures advance according to policy.
Result includes attempted_strategies, selected_strategy, reason_codes and policy snapshot.
ExecutableProposal is persisted as task.last_proposal before execute.
Tests cover first success, fallback, parse error, all declined and LLM-required unavailable.

tasks.title: Fix DeterministicHandlerStrategy wrapper
ist_state: worker/core/deterministic_handler_strategy.py exists.
It resolves task_kind from context.task.get('kind') instead of normalized task_kind.
request_data/service/forwarder are passed as stubs.
Invalid handler payload becomes advisory instead of a clear failed/declined result depending on policy.
acceptance_criteria: Uses normalized task_kind from ProposeContext.
No handler returns declined handler_not_found.
Valid handler command/tool_calls normalize into ExecutableProposal.
Invalid handler payload returns failed invalid_strategy_output or declined per policy.
Tests cover no handler, valid tool_calls, valid command and invalid output.

tasks.title: Decide TemplateProposeHandler role after LLM-required new-project policy
ist_state: No reliable code evidence found for a real TemplateProposeHandler.
Earlier TODO described deterministic Fibonacci generation, but current requirement says new-project should ask the LLM by default.
acceptance_criteria: Template handler is not the default replacement for LLM in new_software_project.
It may exist only as explicit fallback, demo mode or offline bootstrap mode.
When LLM is required and unavailable, do not silently generate a project deterministically.
Tests prove new-project default attempts LLM before template fallback.

tasks.title: Implement real WorkerStrategy for OpenCode/Hermes/native workers
ist_state: propose_task_step currently registers worker_strategy as StubStrategy.
Worker/runtime selection services exist elsewhere but are not wired as a real propose strategy here.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerStrategy uses runtime selection for proposal mode.
ContextAccessPolicy is checked before sending context.
Worker output is normalized through LLMResponseNormalizer or worker-specific adapter.
Free text becomes advisory, not executable.
Tests cover unavailable worker, local worker, cloud blocked and patch proposal.

tasks.title: Implement ToolCallingLLMStrategy and JsonSchemaLLMStrategy with Ollama/OpenAI-compatible calls
ist_state: propose_task_step registers tool_calling_llm and json_schema_llm as StubStrategy.
Therefore new_software_project policy is LLM-first only on paper, not in runtime behavior.
acceptance_criteria: ToolCallingLLMStrategy calls a first-class model invocation service, not sgpt.
Ollama/OpenAI-compatible provider config can be selected as local default.
Real tool schemas are passed via API tools/function calling where supported.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy uses response_format/json_schema or equivalent where supported.
Provider without tools falls back to JSON schema or flexible normalization according to policy.
No raw text output becomes executable without normalization and policy validation.
Tests mock Ollama/OpenAI-compatible success, provider unavailable, tools unsupported, valid schema and prose.

tasks.title: Harden LLMResponseNormalizer
ist_state: agent/services/llm_response_normalizer.py exists.
Current parser is regex-heavy and does not accept full provider_response/tool_calls directly.
Shell blocks become executable without visible command policy checks.
File/diff path safety is incomplete.
The tool_calls regex construction appears fragile.
acceptance_criteria: Normalizer accepts raw_text, provider_response, tool_calls, task_context, policy and expected_output_contract.
OpenAI-compatible tool_calls normalize directly without regex scraping.
Strict JSON and fenced JSON are schema-validated.
Shell block only becomes command when policy explicitly allows shell and command policy accepts it.
Unified diff becomes PatchProposalArtifact, not directly executable.
File blocks become FileProposalArtifact or safe write_file tool_calls only when allowed.
Natural language becomes AdvisoryProposalArtifact.
Tests cover all formats plus malformed JSON and unsafe paths.

tasks.title: Implement bounded LLM repair/coercion
ist_state: No reliable implementation evidence found.
acceptance_criteria: Repair runs at most once per strategy attempt by default.
Repair prompt includes validation errors, target schema, allowed tools and safety limits.
Repaired output passes the same schema/security checks.
Repair cannot broaden permissions or bypass context policy.

tasks.title: Prepare governed LLM context for propose
ist_state: research_context is built in propose_task_step.
No complete governed ContextBundle/ContextAccessPolicy path for local/remote/cloud LLM calls is verified.
acceptance_criteria: LLM context includes goal, task, task_kind, workspace summary, relevant RAG/CodeCompass context, allowed tools and expected artifacts.
ContextAccessPolicy filters context before model/worker calls.
Cloud/external providers do not receive forbidden code/secrets by default.
Tests verify expected context inclusion and sensitive context exclusion.

tasks.title: Make execute consume only normalized ExecutableProposal
ist_state: execute_task_step tries to consume last_proposal.
Validation currently calls ExecutableProposal.model_validate despite ExecutableProposal being a dataclass.
This must be fixed before relying on execute boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Execute without explicit command uses last_proposal only if contract validation passes.
Advisory, patch-only, file-proposal-only or needs_review cannot be executed directly.
Failure reasons distinguish no_executable_proposal, invalid_executable_proposal_format, policy_denied and runtime failure.
Tests cover dataclass/Pydantic fixed validation path.

tasks.title: Complete ArtifactManifest/FileChangeSet collection integration
ist_state: worker/core/artifact_manifest.py exists.
agent/services/worker_output_collector_service.py exists and can validate or synthesize from diff.
Need E2E proof that execute path always calls collector and stores result.
acceptance_criteria: Execute captures before/after snapshots for all relevant workspace execution modes.
Collector result is stored in task verification/completion metadata.
Path traversal, absolute paths and symlink escape are rejected or flagged.
Tests cover manifest present, manifest missing with synth fallback and unsafe paths.

tasks.title: Wire ArtifactCompletionPolicyService into task state transitions
ist_state: agent/services/task_completion_policy_service.py exists.
worker/core/artifact_completion_policy.py is referenced.
Need E2E proof that task status is decided from artifacts/verification for new-project.
acceptance_criteria: Valid artifacts plus passed verification returns completed.
Missing required artifact or failed verification returns retry/needs_review/failed according to policy.
Malformed final model text is ignored/advisory when artifacts pass.
Task state transitions use completion decision consistently.

tasks.title: Prevent retry loops and add needs_review terminal path
ist_state: Needs-review result exists in contracts.
No complete retry-loop regression evidence found.
acceptance_criteria: Parser/normalization failures do not requeue forever.
No executable proposal after all strategies returns needs_review or configured failure.
Retry counter increments only for retryable execution/artifact/verification failures.
Regression test reproduces original prose/parse failure and proves no infinite retry.

tasks.title: E2E new-project Fibonacci with real LLM-default propose
ist_state: No E2E evidence found.
Current LLM strategies are stubs, so this cannot pass as intended yet.
acceptance_criteria: Test submits new-project Fibonacci API goal.
Autoplanner creates new_software_project/coding task.
Default propose path attempts configured local LLM provider, e.g. Ollama/OpenAI-compatible mock.
run_sgpt_command is monkeypatched to raise and flow still succeeds.
Propose returns normalized ExecutableProposal with command/tool_calls.
Execute creates app.py, requirements.txt, README.md and tests.
Verification passes.
Task completes from artifacts/verification.

tasks.title: E2E flexible LLM-assisted project creation and evolution
ist_state: No E2E evidence found.
acceptance_criteria: Mocked LLM tool_calls are accepted and executed.
Mocked fenced JSON normalizes and executes when valid.
Mocked file blocks become safe FileProposalArtifact or write_file tool_calls.
Mocked unified diff becomes PatchProposalArtifact and requires apply/approval path.
Plain natural language becomes advisory and does not execute.
All executable paths require artifact collection and verification.

tasks.title: Expose strategy, LLM normalization and artifact completion in API/CLI/UI
ist_state: No verified UI/API exposure found for the new diagnostic fields.
acceptance_criteria: Task detail API includes effective propose policy, attempted_strategies, selected_strategy and normalization result.
Task detail API includes artifact_summary, manifest_status, verification_status and completion_decision.
CLI shows selected strategy, LLM output format and artifact list.
UI shows strategy chain and artifact completion summary.
Secrets/full artifact contents are not shown by default.

tasks.title: Config, docs and removal of replaced todo files
ist_state: This TODO is now the active consolidated file, but docs/config cleanup still needs verification.
acceptance_criteria: Project/BlueprintRole config can store propose_policy without dropping advanced fields.
Bundle import/export preserves propose_policy.
Docs explain root cause, LLM-required new-project behavior, strategy chain, execute boundary and artifact-first completion.
Docs include Mermaid flow diagram.
Old replaced TODO files are removed or clearly marked superseded.

tasks.title: Replace StubStrategy registrations with real strategy registry
ist_state: TaskScopedExecutionService currently creates StubStrategy for worker_strategy, tool_calling_llm, json_schema_llm, flexible_llm_normalization, advisory_proposal and human_review.
This is the main blocker for real new-project LLM behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Strategies are resolved by a real registry/factory.
tool_calling_llm and json_schema_llm are real implementations.
flexible_llm_normalization invokes LLMResponseNormalizer on actual model output.
Missing strategy is explicit configuration error or declined with diagnostics, not silent stub success.
Tests prove no StubStrategy is used in default new_software_project policy.

tasks.title: Add final review summaries after each implementation slice
ist_state: Previous summary said done=16/todo=4, but review shows only partial foundational work.
acceptance_criteria: After each slice, update current_state_summary.
Update by_status counts from actual task statuses.
Add reviewed evidence and known blockers.
Do not mark tasks done without tests or clear code evidence.

definition_of_done_global: new-project default path attempts a real configured local/provider LLM, preferably Ollama/OpenAI-compatible for local-first use.
If LLM is required but unavailable, the system returns needs_review/failed with explicit reason instead of pretending deterministic generation succeeded.
propose_task_step delegates to ProposeStrategyOrchestrator and uses real strategies, not default stubs.
ProposePolicy controls strategy order, LLM usage, accepted formats and fallback behavior.
Legacy sgpt is disabled by default and explicit compatibility only.
ArtifactCompletionPolicy and verification decide task completion from real outputs.
Malformed model prose/JSON cannot cause infinite retry loops.
E2E tests prove Fibonacci new-project succeeds via LLM-default propose path and artifact-based completion.

review_evidence.finding: propose_task_step delegates to ProposeStrategyOrchestrator, but registers most strategies as StubStrategy; execute_task_step calls ExecutableProposal.model_validate.
Basic orchestrator exists, but diagnostics/persistence/full fallback semantics are incomplete.
new_software_project preset is LLM-first and primary_with_guardrails, but policy alone does not call Ollama/LLM.
Normalizer exists, but is too permissive/fragile and lacks policy-aware safety checks.
Artifact collection service exists and supports manifest or synthesized diff.
Artifact-first completion service exists, but E2E wiring still needs proof.

tasks_status_summary.summary: 17/22 tasks done after FA-T017..FA-T022 implementation session. 4 partially implemented (LLM stubs: FA-T008/T009/T011/T012). FA-T021 (real strategy registry / wire real LLM strategies) is the main remaining blocker for production use.
